case_title: KENNEDY, MATTHEW VS CHALKER, RAYMOND INDIVIDUALLY C/O RAWHIDE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $525.00 FILED BY KENNEDY, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT CHALKER, RAYMOND INDIVIDUALLY  C/O RAWHIDE AND DBA AS SAN FRANCISCO SENTINEL C/O RAWHIDE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
